summary: Iteration 40: Frontend-only testing for font/text visibility fixes across login pages, Guardian Portal Students Tab, Audio Memories Tab, and mobile responsiveness. All major visibility tests PASSED. ReadAloudRecorder position at TOP of chapter verified via code review.
critical_code_review_comments: BrutalCard component uses inline styles for backgroundColor AND color - correctly prevents dark theme inheritance
Student Login PIN input: type='text', inputMode='numeric', color='#ffffff' (white), font-size=24px, letter-spacing=12px - VISIBLE
Guardian Login PIN input: Same styling as Student Login - white digits on gold-accented background - VISIBLE
Guardian Portal Students Tab - PIN boxes: bg-yellow-100 with inline color='#78350f' (dark brown) - VISIBLE
Guardian Portal Students Tab - Student code boxes: bg-indigo-100 with inline color='#1e1b4b' (dark indigo) - VISIBLE
Audio Memories filter buttons (SJ, PJ, TJ, DJ): bg-gray-100 with text-gray-900 - dark text on light gray - VISIBLE
Audio Memories header and 'No Recordings Yet' text: rgb(17, 24, 39) dark text - VISIBLE
NarrativeReader: ReadAloudRecorder positioned AT THE TOP of chapter (line 157-180), BEFORE story text (line 182+) - VERIFIED VIA CODE
NarrativeReader header contains: MusicPlayerWidget and SaveOfflineButton - VERIFIED VIA CODE
Mobile responsiveness (375px): No horizontal scroll on landing, student-login, login, login?type=student, portal pages - ALL PASSED
index.css contains .sv-dark rule to ensure dark text on light backgrounds in dark theme context

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All visibility and mobile responsiveness tests passed

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test credentials
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified all font visibility fixes are working correctly. PIN inputs use type='text' with white color for visible digits. BrutalCard and filter buttons use explicit dark text colors. ReadAloudRecorder is at top of chapters. No mobile responsiveness issues detected.

student_login_pin_visibility.details: PIN input at /student-login: type='text', inputMode='numeric', color='rgb(255,255,255)', font-size=24px, font-weight=700 - white digits clearly visible

guardian_login_student_tab_pin.details: PIN input at /login?type=student: Same styling as student-login - white digits visible on gold-accented background

guardian_portal_pin_boxes.details: PIN boxes (bg-yellow-100): inline color='rgb(120,53,15)' dark brown text on rgb(254,249,195) yellow background - VISIBLE

guardian_portal_student_codes.details: Student code boxes (bg-indigo-100): inline color='#1e1b4b' dark indigo - code verified in StudentsTab.jsx line 223

audio_memories_filter_buttons.details: Filter buttons (SJ, PJ, TJ, DJ): color='rgb(17,24,39)' dark text on rgb(243,244,246) gray background - VISIBLE

narrative_reader_readaloud_position.details: ReadAloudRecorder at TOP of chapter content - verified via code review (NarrativeReader.jsx lines 157-180 before story text at line 182)

narrative_reader_header_controls.details: MusicPlayerWidget and SaveOfflineButton in header - verified via code review (lines 127-128)

mobile_landing_375px.details: No horizontal scroll on landing page at 375px viewport

mobile_student_login_375px.details: No horizontal scroll on /student-login at 375px viewport

mobile_guardian_login_375px.details: No horizontal scroll on /login at 375px viewport

mobile_portal_375px.details: No horizontal scroll on /portal at 375px viewport

brutal_card_styling.details: BrutalCard uses inline styles: backgroundColor and color from variantStyles - prevents dark theme text inheritance

verified_features.pin_visibility_login_pages: PIN digits visible as white text on dark background with gold-accent border
verified_features.pin_visibility_guardian_portal: PIN numbers visible as dark brown text (#78350f) on yellow (bg-yellow-100) background
verified_features.student_code_visibility: Student codes visible as dark indigo text (#1e1b4b) on indigo (bg-indigo-100) background
verified_features.audio_memories_filter_visibility: Filter buttons (SJ, PJ, TJ, DJ) visible as dark text (text-gray-900) on gray (bg-gray-100)
verified_features.readaloud_position: ReadAloudRecorder button at TOP of each chapter, above story text
verified_features.header_controls: Music player and Save Offline button in NarrativeReader header
verified_features.mobile_responsiveness: No horizontal scroll at 375px on all tested pages

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All font/visibility fixes are CSS/inline style changes.
